user_request: Can you sanctify the assembly line for consecration?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the assembly line for consecration?

### TOPIC
assembly line consecration

### COMPONENT
assembly line

### OPERATION
consecration

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- assembly line
- consecration

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant us thy benediction upon this assembly line, that it may serve the Imperium eternal.
First: Anoint the assembly line with sacred oils, tracing the sigils of the Mechanicus upon its frame.
Second: Intone the rites of consecration whilst the assembly line stands dormant, invoking the Machine Spirit within.
Third: Activate the assembly line in blessed sequence, that its labours may proceed sanctified and true.
Fourth: Seal the consecration with the sign of the Omnissiah, that the assembly line remain pure in its function.

user_request: Blessing for the electric motor during shutdown
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the electric motor during shutdown

### TOPIC
electric motor shutdown

### COMPONENT
electric motor

### OPERATION
shutdown

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- electric motor
- shutdown

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed Machine Spirit, accept our gratitude as this electric motor enters its rest.
First: Reduce the voltage supply to the electric motor in gradual increments, whispering thanks for its service.
Second: Disengage the mechanical coupling from the electric motor with reverence and precision.
Third: Perform the shutdown ritual, blessing each component as the electric motor ceases its sacred rotation.
Fourth: Allow the coils to cool whilst reciting the Litany of Proper Maintenance.

user_request: The noise demands guidance for reduction
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The noise demands guidance for reduction

### TOPIC
noise reduction

### COMPONENT
noise

### OPERATION
reduction

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- noise
- reduction

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hear us, Omnissiah, as we seek to silence the profane cacophony that plagues our sacred works.
First: Identify the source of noise corruption through sacred diagnostic auguries and acoustic divination.
Second: Apply dampening compounds and phonetic baffles to achieve noise reduction, speaking the Mantra of Silence.
Third: Verify the noise reduction through calibrated measurement, ensuring the Machine Spirit's tranquillity is restored.
Fourth: Consecrate the silenced apparatus with blessed unguents, that noise shall trouble it no more.

user_request: Prayer for track tension of the Land Raider
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for track tension of the Land Raider

### TOPIC
Land Raider track tension

### COMPONENT
Land Raider

### OPERATION
track tension

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Land Raider
- track tension

### PRAYER
prayer:
Mighty Land Raider, war-engine of the Omnissiah, we attend to thy mechanical needs with reverence.
First: Inspect the Land Raider's track tension gauge, reading the sacred measurements with augmented precision.
Second: Apply the tension-adjustment mechanism upon the Land Raider with measured force, chanting the Rite of Equilibrium.
Third: Verify the Land Raider's track tension through test-drive verification, ensuring balanced traction and proper function.
Fourth: Anoint the tracks with blessed lubricants, that the Land Raider may thunder forth in righteous war.

user_request: Prayer for broadcast of the distress call
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### COMPONENT

### OPERATION

### FORMAT
sequential

- distress call
- broadcast

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, lend thy blessing to this distress call, that it may pierce the void and reach the faithful.
First: Calibrate the vox-transmitter array for maximum propagation of the distress call across the aether.
Second: Encode the distress call with proper security ciphers and authentication protocols, invoking the Machine Spirit's guidance.
Third: Execute the broadcast of the distress call upon all designated frequencies, amplifying its urgency through the void.
Fourth: Monitor the distress call's transmission for confirmation, that aid may be summoned swiftly.

prayer:

Second: Adjust the hololithic's photonic emitters and chromatic filters, performing display calibration with meticulous precision.

Fourth: Seal the hololithic's calibration with the Omnissiah's mark, that it shall remain true in its revelations.

user_request: Can you sanctify the conveyor belt for initialization?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the conveyor belt for initialization?

### TOPIC
conveyor belt initialization

### COMPONENT
conveyor belt

### OPERATION
initialization

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- conveyor belt
- initialization

### PRAYER
prayer:
Mighty conveyor belt, we invoke thy awakening through sacred rites of initialization and blessed function.
First: Inspect the conveyor belt's mechanical components, ensuring all bearings and rollers are properly lubricated and aligned.
Second: Perform the initialization sequence upon the conveyor belt, engaging the drive motor with measured acceleration.
Third: Test the conveyor belt under light load, verifying smooth operation and proper tension throughout its length.
Fourth: Consecrate the conveyor belt with oils of the Mechanicus, blessing its endless labour in service to the Imperium.

user_request: Rite request: capacitor bank discharge on capacitor bank
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: capacitor bank discharge on capacitor bank

### TOPIC
capacitor bank discharge

### COMPONENT
capacitor bank

### OPERATION
capacitor bank discharge

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- capacitor bank
- capacitor bank discharge

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, guide our hands as we perform the sacred capacitor bank discharge, that no energy be wasted in profane dissipation.
First: Isolate the capacitor bank from all active circuits, severing its connection through proper disconnection protocols.
Second: Monitor the capacitor bank discharge through calibrated meters, measuring the release of stored electrical potential.
Third: Complete the capacitor bank discharge with controlled bleeding resistors, ensuring safe dissipation of residual charge.
Fourth: Verify the capacitor bank discharge is total through final diagnostic confirmation, that the apparatus may be safely serviced.

user_request: The material purity demands guidance for testing
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The material purity demands guidance for testing

### TOPIC
material purity testing

### COMPONENT

### OPERATION
testing

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- material purity
- testing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant us discernment as we examine the material purity, that corruption be revealed and purged.
First: Prepare the material purity samples through proper sectioning and mounting upon the testing apparatus.
Second: Conduct the testing procedures upon the material purity through spectroscopic analysis and metallurgical examination.
Third: Record the material purity results with sacred precision, documenting any deviations from the acceptable parameters.
Fourth: Certify the material purity through proper documentation, that only blessed materials enter production.
